mapper.select: insert into repo_snapshots (created_at, trigger_event, git_commit, description, article_count) values ( #{record.createdAt}, #{record.triggerEvent}, #{record.gitCommit}, #{record.description}, #{record.articleCount} ) returning id
mapper.insert: insert into repo_snapshot_items (snapshot_id, entity_type, entity_id, content_hash, payload) values ( #{record.snapshotId}, #{record.entityType}, #{record.entityId}, #{record.contentHash}, #{record.payloadJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler} )
mapper.select: select id, created_at, trigger_event, git_commit, description, article_count from repo_snapshots order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}
select id, snapshot_id, entity_type, entity_id, content_hash, payload::text as payload_json from repo_snapshot_items where snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} order by entity_type asc, entity_id asc
